content: Our paper "Learning Policies for Effective Incentive Allocation in Unknown Social Networks" is accepted at

I gave a talk titled "Influence-aware Incentive Allocation" in the Alibaba Research
 Center for Complexity Sciences at Hangzhou Normal University.
We will organize the Principle and practice of data and Knowledge Acquisition Workshop (PKAW 2020) at IJCAI-PRICAI 2020.
Our papers "Adaptive Incentive Allocation for Influence-aware Proactive Recommendation" and "Incentivizing Long-term Engagement Under Limited Budget" are accepted at
